title: United States Adjustment of Status to Lawful Permanent Resident (Form I-485)
description: Apply to register permanent residence or adjust status to that of a lawful permanent resident ("green card") from within the United States using Form I-485 (Application to Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status), the core USCIS filing that follows an approved or concurrently filed immigrant petition (e.g. Form I-130, I-140, I-360, or I-526/I-526E) or another qualifying basis (asylee/refugee adjustment, Diversity Visa, registry, and others). It does not submit the application, and it is distinct from us/uscis/permanent-resident-card-replacement-i90 (renewing/replacing an existing card, not obtaining status) and consular immigrant-visa processing abroad; the live U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form I-485 PDF at uscis.gov/sites/default/files/document/forms/i-485.pdf (fetched directly, HTTP 200, no access block). All 24 pages extracted as clean text via pdfjs-dist (the form has no fillable AcroForm/XFA fields recognized by pdf-lib) and transcribed field-by-field from that output. Not a time-versioned/edition form: adjustment of status is a one-time filing tied to an underlying immigrant petition or basis, not a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. The extracted text's column-based layout interleaves a small number of item numbers out of reading order in Part 1 (items 8-9 and 13-18) and Part 9 (the 43.b-43.i cross-references, and items 35 and 76-77); each is flagged with an inline field description and documented in VERIFICATION.md rather than guessed silently. Status remains 'draft' pending independent field-by-field source review by a second reviewer.

fields.name: currentFamilyName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Do not provide a nickname.

fields.name: currentGivenName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: currentMiddleName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — middle name (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNameFamilyName
fields.label: Other Names You Have Used Since Birth — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Includes family name at birth, other legal names, nicknames, aliases, and assumed names. The form provides a single entry line; additional names use Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: otherNameGivenName
fields.label: Other Names You Have Used Since Birth — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNameMiddleName
fields.label: Other Names You Have Used Since Birth — middle name (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: everUsedOtherDateOfBirth
fields.label: Have you ever used any other date of birth?

fields.name: otherDatesOfBirth
fields.label: Other dates of birth you have used
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when everUsedOtherDateOfBirth is true. Comma-separated list of YYYY-MM-DD dates if more than one.

fields.name: hasAlienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Do you have an Alien Registration Number (A-Number)?

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: A-Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Digits only (the form prefixes a printed "A-").

fields.name: everUsedOtherANumber
fields.label: Have you ever used, or been assigned, any other A-Number?

fields.name: otherANumbersUsed
fields.label: Other A-Number(s) used
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when everUsedOtherANumber is true. Comma-separated list if more than one.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: placeOfBirthCity

fields.sourceRef: Form I-485 Part 1, Place of Birth (following item 6)

fields.label: Organization 1 — nature of organization, including its purposes and activities, whether illicit or legitimate

fields.name: organization1InvolvementNature
fields.label: Organization 1 — nature of involvement in organization, including role or position(s) held, whether illicit or legitimate

fields.name: organization1DatesFrom
fields.label: Organization 1 — dates of membership or involvement, from

fields.name: organization1DatesTo
fields.label: Organization 1 — dates of membership or involvement, to

fields.name: organization2Name
fields.label: Organization 2 — name of organization

fields.name: organization2City
fields.label: Organization 2 — city or town
fields.description: The extracted source text does not attach an explicit item number to this field; inferred as item 7 by position between items 6 and 8. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: organization2StateOrProvince
fields.label: Organization 2 — state or province

fields.name: organization2Country
fields.label: Organization 2 — country

fields.name: organization2Nature
fields.label: Organization 2 — nature of organization, including its purposes and activities, whether illicit or legitimate

fields.name: organization2InvolvementNature
fields.label: Organization 2 — nature of involvement in organization, including role or position(s) held, whether illicit or legitimate

fields.name: organization2DatesFrom
fields.label: Organization 2 — dates of membership or involvement, from

fields.name: organization2DatesTo
fields.label: Organization 2 — dates of membership or involvement, to

fields.name: everDeniedAdmissionToUs
fields.label: Have you EVER been denied admission to the United States?

fields.name: everWorkedInUsWithoutAuthorization
fields.label: Have you EVER worked in the United States without authorization?

fields.name: everDeniedVisaToUs
fields.label: Have you EVER been denied a visa to the United States?

fields.name: everViolatedNonimmigrantStatus
fields.label: Have you EVER violated the terms or conditions of your nonimmigrant status?

fields.name: everInRemovalExclusionRescissionOrDeportationProceedings
fields.label: Are you presently or have you EVER been in removal, exclusion, rescission, or deportation proceedings, including expedited removal proceedings?

fields.name: everIssuedFinalOrderOfExclusionDeportationOrRemoval
fields.label: Have you EVER been issued a final order of exclusion, deportation, or removal?

fields.name: everHadPriorFinalOrderReinstated
fields.label: Have you EVER had a prior final order of exclusion, deportation, or removal reinstated?

fields.name: everGrantedVoluntaryDepartureButFailedToDepart
fields.label: Have you EVER been granted voluntary departure by an immigration officer or an immigration judge but failed to depart within the allotted time?

fields.name: everAppliedForReliefFromRemoval
fields.label: Have you EVER applied for any kind of relief or protection from removal, exclusion, or deportation?

fields.name: everJNonimmigrantSubjectToTwoYearRequirement
fields.label: Have you EVER been a J nonimmigrant exchange visitor who was subject to the two-year foreign residence requirement?

fields.name: compliedWithForeignResidenceRequirement
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 19, have you complied with the foreign residence requirement?

fields.name: grantedWaiverOrFavorableRecommendation
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 19 and "No" to Item Number 20, have you been granted a waiver or has the Department of State issued a favorable waiver recommendation letter for you?
fields.description: Required when everJNonimmigrantSubjectToTwoYearRequirement is true and compliedWithForeignResidenceRequirement is false.

fields.name: everArrestedCitedChargedOrDetained
fields.label: Have you EVER been arrested, cited, charged, or permitted to participate in a diversion program (including pre-trial diversion, deferred prosecution, deferred adjudication, or any withheld adjudication), or detained for any reason by any law enforcement official in any country?
fields.description: Answer 'Yes' even if records were sealed or cleared. If true, explain each offense using Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: everCommittedCrime
fields.label: Have you EVER committed a crime of any kind (even if you were not arrested, cited, charged with, or tried for that crime, or convicted)?

fields.name: everPledGuiltyOrConvicted
fields.label: Have you EVER pled guilty to or been convicted of a crime or offense (even if subsequently expunged, sealed, pardoned, or granted amnesty, a rehabilitation decree, or other act of clemency)?

fields.name: everOrderedPunishedOrLibertyRestrained
fields.label: Have you EVER been ordered punished by a judge or had conditions imposed on you that restrained your liberty (such as a prison sentence, suspended sentence, house arrest, parole, alternative sentencing, drug or alcohol treatment, rehabilitative programs or classes, probation, or community service)?

fields.name: everViolatedControlledSubstanceLaw
fields.label: Have you EVER violated (or attempted or conspired to violate) any controlled substance law or regulation of a state, the United States, or a foreign country?

fields.name: everTraffickedControlledSubstances
fields.label: Have you EVER trafficked in or benefited from, or knowingly aided, abetted, assisted, conspired or colluded in the illegal trafficking of any controlled substances, such as chemicals, illegal drugs, or narcotics?

fields.name: isSpouseOrChildOfControlledSubstanceTraffickerWithBenefit
fields.label: Are you the spouse, son, or daughter of an alien who illicitly trafficked or aided in the illicit trafficking of a controlled substance, and you obtained, within the last 5 years, any financial or other benefit from this activity of your spouse or parent?

fields.name: knewBenefitFromControlledSubstanceTraffickingRelative
fields.label: If your answer to Item Number 28 is "Yes," did you know or should you have reasonably known that the financial or other benefit you obtained resulted from this activity of your spouse or parent?

fields.name: everEngagedInOrComingForProstitution
fields.label: Have you EVER engaged in prostitution or are you coming to the United States to engage in prostitution?

fields.name: everProcuredOrImportedPersonsForProstitution
fields.label: Have you EVER directly or indirectly procured or attempted to procure, or imported prostitutes or persons for the purpose of prostitution?

fields.name: everReceivedProceedsFromProstitution
fields.label: Have you EVER received any proceeds or money from prostitution?

fields.name: intendCommercializedVice
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in illegal gambling or any other form of commercialized vice, such as prostitution, bootlegging, or the sale of child pornography, while in the United States?

fields.name: everExercisedImmunityToAvoidProsecution
fields.label: Have you EVER exercised immunity (diplomatic or otherwise) to avoid being prosecuted for a criminal offense in the United States?

fields.name: everServedAsForeignGovernmentOfficial
fields.label: Have you EVER served as a foreign government official?
fields.sourceRef: Form I-485 Part 9, item 35 (numbered "25" in the extracted PDF text; treated as a transcription artifact given its position in the 34→36 sequence, see VERIFICATION.md)

fields.name: responsibleForReligiousFreedomViolations
fields.label: If your answer to Item Number 35 is "Yes," have you EVER been responsible for, enforced, or directly carried out violations of religious freedoms?

fields.name: everInducedSexTrafficking
fields.label: Have you EVER induced by force, fraud, or coercion (or otherwise been involved in) the trafficking of another person for commercial sex acts (sex trafficking)?

fields.name: everTraffickedForInvoluntaryServitude
fields.label: Have you EVER trafficked a person into involuntary servitude, peonage, debt bondage, or slavery?

fields.name: everAidedTraffickingForSexOrServitude
fields.label: Have you EVER knowingly aided, abetted, assisted, conspired, or colluded with others in trafficking in persons for commercial sex acts or involuntary servitude, peonage, debt bondage, or slavery?

fields.name: isSpouseOrChildOfTraffickerWithBenefit
fields.label: Are you the spouse, son, or daughter of an alien who engaged in the trafficking in persons and have received or obtained, within the last 5 years, any financial or other benefits from this activity of your spouse or parent?

fields.name: knewBenefitFromTraffickingRelative
fields.label: If your answer is "Yes" to Item Number 39, did you know or reasonably should have known that this benefit resulted from this activity of your spouse or parent?

fields.name: everEngagedInMoneyLaundering
fields.label: Have you EVER engaged in money laundering or have you EVER knowingly aided, assisted, abetted, conspired, or colluded with others in money laundering or do you seek to enter the United States to engage in such activity?

fields.name: intendEspionageOrSabotage
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any activity that violates or evades any law relating to espionage (including spying) or sabotage in the United States?

fields.name: intendViolateExportControlLaw
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any activity in the United States that violates or evades any law prohibiting the export from the United States of goods, technology, or sensitive information?

fields.name: intendOpposeOrOverthrowUsGovernment
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any activity whose purpose includes opposing, controlling, or overthrowing the U.S. Government by force, violence, or other unlawful means while in the United States?

fields.name: intendOtherUnlawfulActivity
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any other unlawful activity?

fields.name: everReceivedWeaponsOrParamilitaryTraining
fields.label: Have you EVER received any weapons training, paramilitary training, or other military-type training?
fields.description: 43.b-43.i's cross-references to each other (e.g. "described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.e.") appear inconsistently in the extracted source text (sometimes "43.b.-43.c."); the individual activity descriptions below are transcribed as printed, but see VERIFICATION.md for the range-reference caveat.

fields.name: everCommittedKidnappingAssassinationOrHijacking
fields.label: Have you EVER committed kidnapping, assassination, or hijacking or sabotage of a conveyance (including an aircraft, vessel, vehicle, or train)?

fields.name: everUsedWeaponToEndangerOrDamage
fields.label: Have you EVER used a weapon or explosive or any dangerous device with the intent to endanger the safety of another person or people or cause damage to property?

fields.name: everThreatenedOrPlannedActs43bTo43c
fields.label: Have you EVER threatened, attempted, conspired, prepared, or planned to do any of the things described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.c.?

fields.name: everIncitedActs43bTo43c
fields.label: Have you EVER incited, under circumstances indicating an intention to cause death or serious bodily harm/injury, any of the activities described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.c.?

fields.name: everParticipatedInGroupDoingActs43bTo43e
fields.label: Have you EVER participated in, or been a member of, a group or organization that did any of the activities described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.e.?

fields.name: everRecruitedOrFundraisedForGroupDoingActs43bTo43e
fields.label: Have you EVER recruited members or asked for money or things of value for a group or organization that did any of the activities described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.e.?

fields.name: everProvidedSupportForActs43bTo43e
fields.label: Have you EVER provided money, a thing of value, services or labor, or any other assistance or support for any of the activities described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.e.?

fields.name: everProvidedSupportForIndividualOrGroupDoingActs43bTo43e
fields.label: Have you EVER provided money, a thing of value, services or labor, or any other assistance or support for an individual, group, or organization who did any of the activities described in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.e.?

fields.name: intendActs43bTo43i
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any of the activities listed in any part of Item Numbers 43.b.-43.i.?

fields.name: intendEndangerUsWelfareSafetyOrSecurity
fields.label: Do you intend to engage in any activity that could endanger the welfare, safety, or security of the United States?

fields.name: isSpouseOrChildOfPersonDoingActs43bTo43i
fields.label: Are you the spouse or child of an individual who EVER engaged in any of the activities listed in Item Numbers 43.b.-43.i.?

fields.name: everSoldOrTransportedWeaponsForUseAgainstPerson
fields.label: Have you EVER sold, provided, or transported weapons, or assisted any person in selling, providing, or transporting weapons, which you knew or believed would be used against another person?

fields.name: everWorkedOrParticipatedInDetentionFacility
fields.label: Have you EVER worked, volunteered, or otherwise served in any prison, jail, prison camp, detention facility, labor camp, or any other place where people were detained, or have you EVER directed or participated in any other activity that involved detaining people?

fields.name: everServedInMilitaryOrPoliceUnit
fields.label: Have you EVER served in, been a member of, assisted (helped), or participated in any military or police unit?

fields.name: everMemberOfGroupUsingWeaponAgainstPerson
fields.label: Have you EVER been a member of, assisted, or participated in any group, unit, or organization of any kind in which you or other persons used any type of weapon against any person or threatened to do so?

fields.name: everMemberOfCommunistOrTotalitarianParty
fields.label: Have you EVER been a member of, or in any way affiliated with, the Communist Party or any totalitarian party (in the United States or abroad)?

fields.name: everServedInArmedGroup
fields.label: Have you EVER served in, been a member of, assisted (helped), or participated in any armed group (e.g. paramilitary unit, self-defense unit, vigilante unit, rebel group, or guerrilla group)?

fields.name: everOrderedOrParticipatedInTorture
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in torture?

fields.name: everOrderedOrParticipatedInGenocide
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in genocide?

fields.name: everKilledOrTriedToKill
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in killing, or trying to kill, any person?

fields.name: everSeverelyInjuredOrTriedToInjure
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in intentionally and severely injuring or trying to injure any person?

fields.name: everRecruitedChildSoldiers
fields.label: Have you EVER recruited, enlisted, conscripted, or used any person under 15 years of age to take part in hostilities or to serve in or help an armed force or group, or attempted or worked with others to do so?

fields.name: everUsedChildSoldiersInHostilities
fields.label: Have you EVER used any person under 15 years of age to take part in hostilities (e.g. participating in combat, providing services related to combat such as sabotage or serving as a courier, or providing support services such as transporting supplies), or attempted or worked with others to do so?

fields.name: publicChargeExemptCategory
fields.label: Public charge ground of inadmissibility (INA section 212(a)(4)) — exempt category, or none (select only one box)
fields.description: If 'not_exempt' is selected, complete Item Numbers 57-66 (the publicCharge* fields below); otherwise skip to Item Number 67.

fields.name: publicChargeHouseholdSize
fields.label: What is the size of your household?

fields.name: publicChargeAnnualHouseholdIncome
fields.label: Indicate your annual household income.

fields.name: publicChargeHouseholdAssets
fields.label: Identify the total value of your household assets.

fields.name: publicChargeHouseholdLiabilities
fields.label: Identify the total value of your household liabilities (including both secured and unsecured liabilities).

fields.name: highestEducationCompleted
fields.label: What is the highest degree or grade of school you have completed?

fields.name: highestGradeCompletedIfLessThanHighSchool
fields.label: If less than a high school diploma, indicate the highest grade of school you have completed.

fields.name: certificationsLicensesSkills
fields.label: List your certifications, licenses, skills obtained through work experience, and educational certificates.

fields.name: everReceivedMeansTestedPublicBenefits
fields.label: Have you ever received Supplemental Security Income (SSI), Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), or state, Tribal, territorial, or local cash benefit programs for income maintenance ("General Assistance")?
fields.description: Required when publicChargeExemptCategory is 'not_exempt'. If true, give publicChargeBenefitsReceivedDetail.

fields.name: publicChargeBenefitsReceivedDetail
fields.label: Benefits received — name, start date, end date, dollar amount, and whether received while in a category exempt from public charge (one entry per line)
fields.description: Required when everReceivedMeansTestedPublicBenefits is true. The source form provides a repeating table (up to 8 rows) not natively representable as of v0.3 (GSP-0009); modeled as free text, one benefit per line.

fields.name: everReceivedLongTermInstitutionalizationAtGovernmentExpense
fields.label: Have you ever received long-term institutionalization at government expense?
fields.description: Required when publicChargeExemptCategory is 'not_exempt'. If true, give institutionalizationDetail.

fields.name: institutionalizationDetail
fields.label: Institutionalization — institution name/city/state, start date, end date, reason, and whether it occurred while in a category exempt from public charge (one entry per line)
fields.description: Required when everReceivedLongTermInstitutionalizationAtGovernmentExpense is true. Repeating table (GSP-0009); modeled as free text, one institutionalization period per line.

fields.name: everFailedToAttendRemovalProceeding
fields.label: Have you EVER failed or refused to attend or to remain in attendance at any removal proceeding filed against you on or after April 1, 1997?
fields.description: If true, attach a written statement explaining the failure or refusal, including any reasonable-cause explanation.

fields.name: everSubmittedFraudulentDocumentation
fields.label: Have you EVER submitted altered, fraudulent, or counterfeit documentation to any U.S. Government official to obtain or attempt to obtain any immigration benefit, including a visa or entry into the United States?

fields.name: everLiedOrMisrepresentedForImmigrationBenefit
fields.label: Have you EVER lied about, concealed, or misrepresented any information on an application or petition to obtain a visa, other documentation required for entry into the United States, admission to the United States, or any other kind of immigration benefit?

fields.name: everFalselyClaimedUsCitizenship
fields.label: Have you EVER falsely claimed to be a U.S. citizen (in writing or any other way)?

fields.name: everStowawayOnVesselOrAircraft
fields.label: Have you EVER been a stowaway on a vessel or aircraft arriving in the United States?

fields.name: underFinalOrderOfCivilPenaltyIna274c
fields.label: Are you under a final order of civil penalty for violating INA section 274C for use of fraudulent documents?

fields.name: everEncouragedAlienSmuggling
fields.label: Have you EVER knowingly encouraged, induced, assisted, abetted, or aided any alien to enter or to try to enter the United States illegally (alien smuggling)?

fields.name: everEnteredUsWithoutInspection
fields.label: Have you EVER entered the United States without being inspected and admitted or paroled?

fields.name: everExcludedDeportedOrRemoved
fields.label: Have you EVER been excluded, deported, or removed from the United States, or have you ever departed the United States on your own after having been ordered excluded, deported, or removed from the United States?

fields.name: everUnlawfullyPresentSince1997
fields.label: Since April 1, 1997, have you EVER been unlawfully present in the United States?
fields.description: Unlawfully present means present after the expiration of the period of stay authorized by DHS, or present without being admitted or paroled.

fields.name: severeTraffickingCentralReasonForUnlawfulPresence
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 76, was a severe form of trafficking in persons at least one central reason for your unlawful presence in the United States?

fields.name: reenteredAfterOneYearUnlawfulPresence
fields.label: Since April 1, 1997, have you EVER reentered or attempted to reenter the United States without being inspected and admitted or paroled after having been unlawfully present in the United States for more than one year in the aggregate on or after April 1, 1997?

fields.name: reenteredAfterDeportationExclusionOrRemoval
fields.label: Since April 1, 1997, have you EVER reentered or attempted to reenter the United States without being inspected and admitted or paroled after having been deported, excluded, or removed from the United States?

fields.name: everDetainedUsCitizenChildAbroad
fields.label: Have you EVER assisted in detaining, retaining, or withholding custody of a U.S. citizen child outside the United States from a person who has been granted custody of the child?

fields.name: everVotedInViolationOfLaw
fields.label: Have you EVER voted in violation of any Federal, state, or local constitutional provision, statute, ordinance, or regulation in the United States?

fields.name: everRenouncedCitizenshipToAvoidTax
fields.label: Have you EVER renounced U.S. citizenship to avoid being taxed by the United States?

fields.name: accompanyingInadmissibleAlienRequiringGuardianship
fields.label: Are you accompanying an alien who is inadmissible and who has been certified by a medical officer as helpless from sickness, mental or physical disability, or infancy, and who requires your protection or guardianship, as described in INA section 232(c)?

fields.name: planToPracticePolygamy
fields.label: Do you plan to practice polygamy in the United States?

fields.name: appliedForExemptionFromArmedForcesTrainingAsAlien
fields.label: Have you EVER applied for exemption or discharge from training or service in the U.S. armed forces or in the U.S. National Security Training Corps on the ground that you are an alien?

fields.name: relievedFromArmedForcesTrainingAsAlien
fields.label: Have you EVER been relieved or discharged from such training or service on the ground that you are an alien?

fields.name: convictedOfDesertion
fields.label: Have you EVER been convicted of desertion from the U.S. armed forces?

fields.name: leftUsToAvoidMilitaryServiceInWartime
fields.label: Have you EVER left or remained outside the United States to avoid or evade training or service in the U.S. armed forces in time of war or a period declared by the President to be a national emergency?

fields.name: statusBeforeLeavingToAvoidMilitaryService
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 85, what was your nationality or immigration status immediately before you left (e.g. U.S. citizen or national, lawful permanent resident, nonimmigrant, parolee, present without admission or parole, or any other status)?

fields.name: applicantDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Daytime Telephone Number

fields.name: applicantMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's Email Address (if any)

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Applicant's Signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant certifies under penalty of perjury that all responses and information are complete, true, and correct, and authorizes release of records USCIS may need to determine eligibility.

fields.name: interpreterFamilyName
fields.label: Interpreter's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Complete Part 11 only if an interpreter was used to read the application and Instructions to the applicant.

fields.name: interpreterGivenName
fields.label: Interpreter's Given Name (First Name)

fields.name: interpreterBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Interpreter's Business or Organization Name

fields.name: interpreterDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Daytime Telephone Number

fields.name: interpreterMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)

fields.name: interpreterEmail
fields.label: Interpreter's Email Address (if any)

fields.name: interpreterLanguage
fields.label: Language in which the interpreter is fluent and in which the application and Instructions were interpreted to the applicant

fields.name: interpreterSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Interpreter's Signature

fields.name: preparerFamilyName
fields.label: Preparer's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Complete Part 12 only if someone other than the applicant prepared this application.

fields.name: preparerGivenName
fields.label: Preparer's Given Name (First Name)

fields.name: preparerBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Preparer's Business or Organization Name

fields.name: preparerDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Daytime Telephone Number

fields.name: preparerMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)

fields.name: preparerEmail
fields.label: Preparer's Email Address (if any)

fields.name: preparerSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Preparer's Signature
